'''Suyin''' was an individual who was transporting [[Spice/Legends|spice]] to give to [[Feraa]] in [[Visquis]]'s underground lair, only to die in its maze after stepping on a [[Mine/Legends|mine]] and injuring a leg. [[Meetra Surik]] later found Suyin's corpse and [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]].

{{Char-stub}}
